title: M&E Manager — Commercial Fit-Out Programme (Contract)
description_raw:
Lancer Scott are recruiting an M&E Manager to lead mechanical and electrical services delivery on a large commercial fit-out programme in central Manchester. The main contractor engagement is direct — inside IR35 via umbrella.

The programme covers Cat A and Cat B fit-out of a 14-storey Grade-A office building. M&E scope includes:
- HVAC: fan coil units, AHU, chilled water, heating systems
- Building services: LV distribution, lighting, life safety
- BMS integration and commissioning
- Domestic hot and cold water services, sprinkler systems

Your accountabilities:
- Single point of contact for the M&E construction package
- Manage subcontractors (mechanical and electrical trades)
- Drive the M&E construction programme and attend fortnightly client progress meetings
- Coordinate with main contractor’s structural, fit-out and IT/AV workstreams
- Sign off all M&E BREEAM documentation

Profile:
- Mechanical or electrical engineering HND/HNC + 12 years’ M&E construction experience
- SMSTS, First Aid, Black CSCS card
- Building services sector experience essential

Rate: £450–500/day inside IR35
Duration: 10 months
Start: 4 weeks’ notice acceptable
Location: Manchester city centre — site-based
